steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: The key signal is “Few economists would have predicted... but soar they did” — this reveals the collectibles market's core difficulty: its price movements are unpredictable, even for experts.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content: Forecast means to predict future market developments, which is what the passage identifies as difficult for the collectibles market. Monitor (observe), avoid (refrain from), and exchange (trade) don't capture this prediction sense. That is the correct answer.
